quests.name: First Steps
quests.hint: Go to the desk in your room.

steps.description: Pick up the phone from the desk.

quests.name: Get Active
quests.hint: Head to the city centre and visit the clothing store.

steps.description: Buy a sport outfit and sport shoes at the clothing store in the city.
Put on your sport set and go for a jog in the park.

quests.name: Find Work
quests.hint: Money doesn't last forever. Head to the city and check the job board.

steps.description: Visit the job board in the city centre and apply for a position.
Go to the swimming pool and work your first cleaning shift.

quests.name: Stock Up
quests.hint: Your fridge is looking sparse. Visit the supermarket in the city centre.

quests.name: Be a good person!
quests.hint: You've gotten to know someone in need. Visit him at his shelter.

steps.description: Help Frank get a proper shower.
Stay with Frank for the night.
